meta.homeDescription: PHMarket guides you to fuel stations with quality fuel where you can use discount codes. No registration, no fees, no plastic cards.
meta.ogDescription: Discount codes for fuel at partner stations. No registration, no plastic cards.

footer.tagline: A smart app for saving on fuel. No registration, no fees, no plastic cards.

hero.subtitle: PHMarket guides you to fuel stations with quality fuel where you can use discount codes. No registration, no fees, no plastic cards. All in your phone.

savings.title: How much we have saved together
savings.subtitle: The number grows in real time, we keep saving every second

homeCta.subtitle: Download the PHMarket app and start using discount codes at partner fuel stations across the Czech Republic.

tankujtePage.metaDescription: Fuel up cheaper with discount codes in the PHMarket app. No registration, no fees, no plastic cards. All in your phone.
tankujtePage.title: Fuel up <hl>cheaper</hl>
tankujtePage.subtitle: With the PHMarket app you save on every fill-up. Just show the discount code right at the station till and the discount is deducted instantly from the fuel price.

benefits.title: Save up to 3 CZK per litre
benefits.desc: Thanks to exclusive discount codes you save on every fill-up.

benefits.title: No registration
benefits.desc: No complicated sign-ups or filling in forms. Download and fuel up.

benefits.title: No fees
benefits.desc: The app is completely free. No hidden fees or subscriptions.

benefits.title: No plastic cards
benefits.desc: Done with loyalty cards. Everything is conveniently in your phone.

benefits.title: 100+ stations
benefits.desc: A network of partner fuel stations across the Czech Republic.

benefits.title: Quality fuel
benefits.desc: We work only with verified fuel stations offering quality fuel.

tankujtePage.ctaSubtitle: Download the PHMarket app and redeem your first discount code.

phmapPage.metaDescription: PHMap shows you the nearest partner fuel stations with discount codes for fuel. Find a station and save.
phmapPage.subtitle: An interactive map of partner fuel stations. Find the nearest station with current discount codes.

features.title: Nearest stations
features.desc: Shows partner fuel stations near you, sorted by distance.

features.title: Current discounts
features.desc: For each station you see the current discount codes and the saving per litre.

features.title: Navigation
features.desc: With one tap you start navigation straight to the chosen station.

articlesPage.metaDescription: Articles and news from the world of fuel, fuel stations and saving when filling up.
articlesPage.title: Articles
articlesPage.heroSubtitle: News and tips from the world of fuel and smart fuelling.
